overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban environment. The player approaches a brutalist pedestrian overpass, ascends covered stairs, and walks along an elevated walkway overlooking a busy highway and the iconic Arasaka industrial complex. The scene features warm desert-like lighting, clear skies, and distinctive futuristic architecture.

events.description: approaching the entrance to the covered pedestrian overpass stairway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the futuristic overpass structure

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall pole with distinctive orange rectangular light fixture
futuristic brutalist concrete structure with angled ramps and stairway entrance
large red building with white corporate logo visible on facade
elevated highway structure with vehicles moving along it

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk toward a massive futuristic pedestrian overpass. An orange street light stands prominently in the foreground while a red industrial building rises in the background. Vehicles move along the highway ramp to the left as the player approaches the overpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairway ascending to overpass

events.description: entering the covered stairway from the open street
continuing ascent of the long concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt ascending stairs ahead of player
pedestrian in white shirt walking up the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with shadow patterns from overhead structure
elongated vertical light fixtures mounted on the stairway walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters the covered stairway and begins ascending the concrete steps. The space is enclosed with brutalist concrete architecture and illuminated by vertical wall lights. Two pedestrians walk ahead up the stairs as the exterior street view disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with highway overlook

events.description: exiting stairway into upper covered walkway with open sides
turning to look out over the highway intersection below

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered overpass and pausing to look at the city views

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction through the overpass

entered.detail: multi-lane highway intersection with moving traffic and crosswalks below
row of palm trees lining the distant avenue
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the top of the stairs and enters the elevated walkway, which has open sides overlooking the city. The view opens up to show a busy highway intersection below, palm-lined avenues, and distant mountains. Another pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction as the player moves through the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: overpass with view of Arasaka industrial complex

events.description: turning to face the Arasaka building and industrial construction zone
construction site with cranes and industrial buildings comes into full view

agents.ego_description: walking along the overpass while observing the industrial landscape and Arasaka tower

entered.detail: massive black skyscraper with vertical 'ARASAKA' signage and industrial detailing
active construction area with scaffolding, materials, and unfinished structures
large yellow crane arm extending over the construction site
smoke rising from industrial stacks in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player turns to face the iconic Arasaka tower, a massive brutalist skyscraper dominating the left side of the frame. Below lies an active industrial construction site with yellow cranes and scaffolding. Smoke rises from distant industrial stacks as the player continues along the overpass, with no other pedestrians visible in this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with structural concrete beams

events.description: turning back toward the walkway direction after viewing the industrial zone

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered overpass structure with views of the highway below

entered.detail: massive angled concrete support columns and beams of the overpass structure
long horizontal fluorescent light fixtures along the walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the covered walkway, with the Arasaka building and industrial views now behind. The camera passes massive concrete support beams and linear ceiling lights that illuminate the path. Glimpses of the highway traffic are visible through openings in the structure as the player continues forward through the enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban sidewalk into the enclosed depths of a brutalist pedestrian overpass. It begins by approaching a massive concrete structure past an orange street light and a red industrial building, before transitioning into a covered stairway where the exterior view vanishes behind vertical wall lights and gray concrete. As the player reaches the top, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway overlooking a busy highway intersection and palm-lined avenues under a clear sky. The camera then turns toward the dominating silhouette of the Arasaka tower and a construction site filled with yellow cranes and rising smoke before moving deeper into the structure. Finally, the view of the city fades as the camera passes under massive concrete support beams and linear ceiling lights, leaving only glimpses of highway traffic through the openings of the enclosed passage.
